title: Pipeline Map
description: Structured description of a project's data flow, consumed by /explain-panel to generate an accordion documentation component.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema file. Enables IDE autocomplete and inline validation.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Required for forward compatibility. /explain-panel will refuse maps with unknown versions and direct the user to migrate/.

project.description: Human-readable project name. Used in the generated component header.

framework.description: Primary framework. Drives component generation target (TSX vs SFC) and syntax-highlighter language defaults.

roots.description: Workspace roots scanned during exploration. Single entry for non-monorepo projects, multiple for monorepos. Paths are relative to the repository root. Absolute paths (leading `/`) and traversal sequences (`..`) are rejected at schema-validation time (syntactic containment). Symlink targets are checked at audit time — same containment contract as `file`.

header.description: Header text displayed at the top of the generated component. All fields optional — when missing, the renderer falls back to the `default` values declared on each property below (currently French — single source of truth).

title.default: Comment ça marche — flux de données complet
title.description: Title shown above the group chips.

icon.description: Single emoji prefixed to the title. HTML-special characters (<, >, ", &) and template-literal metacharacters are rejected at validation time.

groups.description: Pipeline stages ordered chronologically. Each group contains 1–8 sections.

label.description: Display name shown on the group chip and section divider.

oneOf.description: Preset Tailwind color. Expands to text-{c}-500 border-{c}-500/30 bg-{c}-500/5.

text.description: CSS class or hex color for text. HTML-special characters and template-literal metacharacters rejected.

border.description: CSS class or hex color for border. HTML-special characters and template-literal metacharacters rejected.

bg.description: CSS class or hex color for background. HTML-special characters and template-literal metacharacters rejected.

oneOf.description: Custom color object. Use when preset colors are exhausted or for brand colors.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier across all sections (not just within a group).

icon.description: Single emoji character (graphemes that render as one glyph allowed). HTML-special characters (<, >, ", &) and template-literal metacharacters are rejected at validation time.

title.description: Action-phrase title describing what the section's code does.

summary.description: Optional one-sentence prose summary rendered above the code snippet.

file.description: Path to the source file containing the snippet. Relative to repository root, regardless of which `roots` entry it lives under. Path-traversal sequences (`..`), absolute paths (leading `/`), and characters outside `[A-Za-z0-9_./-]` are rejected at schema-validation time — this closes the syntactic-traversal gap. The audit phase (Phase 2 Pass A) additionally resolves each path and verifies the real path (including symlink targets) stays within the repository root.

function.description: Name of the primary function/class/symbol the snippet illustrates. Used in audit checks and the `module` display string.

module.description: Display string shown in the section header. Conventionally `<file> · <function>()`.

language.description: Source language. Drives syntax highlighting in the generated component.

snippet_start.description: First line of the snippet within `file` (1-indexed, inclusive).

snippet_end.description: Last line of the snippet within `file` (1-indexed, inclusive). Must be >= snippet_start. (snippet_end - snippet_start) should be between 14 and 34 for readability.

annotations.description: Map of snippet-relative line numbers to explanatory notes. Line `1` is the first line of the snippet (NOT line `snippet_start` in the file). Each note should explain WHY the line exists, not WHAT it does. Keep notes under 200 characters for layout.

group.description: Group id this section belongs to. MUST match an id in the top-level `groups[]`. Optional in storage (derivable from nesting) but populated by /explore-pipeline for audit convenience.
